title: Research
section: Population modeling to evaluate restoration success
text:
Population modeling to evaluate restoration success
PVA in Keuka Lake

title: Alex L. Koeberle
text:
I am a Postdoctoral Associate in the Natural Resources and the Environment Section at Cornell University.
I work in fisheries and aquatic ecology, and am interested in applying quantitative methods from population ecology and ecosystem science to address fisheries sustainability. My present research explores food web restoration in the Great Lakes basin.
Before my current position, I completed my PhD in Natural Resources at Cornell and MS in Fisheries Science at Oregon State. I earned my BS in Natural Resources from Cornell.
Contact: alk239@cornell.edu
